creator: postmaster@shikahrsoho.com
text:
A 'make extract' of cyrus-1.6.22 in ports, in an effort to eyeball
    code to see if the function is appropriate for the local
    environment, did a make extract, build, and _install_ of
    cyrus-sasl-1.5.24.

How-To-Repeat: 
	

	cd /usr/ports/mail/cyrus
    make extract

         The extract also did a make extract, build, and _install_
         of cyrus-sasl. That install introduced a new userid 
         "cyrus", uid=60, and group "cyrus", gid=61.
